title: The Group Ring Of a Class Of Infinite Nilpotent Groups
abstract: Introduction. In this paper we study the (discrete) group ring Γ of a finitely generated torsion free nilpotent groupover a field of characteristic zero. We show that if Δ is the ideal of Γ spanned by all elements of the form G − 1, where G ∈, thenand the only element belonging to Δwfor all w is the zero element (cf. (4.3) below).
